w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Thank you for your interest in our professional services. We have pleasure in furnishing the following service scopes for your consideration: -
感谢您对我们的针对公司相关服务的关注和信任，我们很荣幸提供以下服务项目供您参阅
Company KYC and background checks for all directors and shareholders
客户背景调查和尽职调查
Name application and Company registration including all government fees
公司名字申请和成立（包括政府费用
Preparation of First Board Meeting Minutes and Resolutions and related forms
第一次股东大会决议文件和相关董事决议文件（涵盖其他公司设立相关文件）
Company Registers and other post incorporation documents
公司注册簿和其他公司注册后文件
Register of Controller and updates with government
Preparation of Bank opening Resolutions and assist in Bank opening
开户董事决议文件准备
支持，包括任命数据保护官（DPO）以及生成

Safe custody of statutory records i.e. keeps minute files and statutory registers (e.g. register of shareholders, register of directors and secretaries, register of transfer, register of charges &etc.)
Preparing all documentation in connection with the routine Annual General Meeting (“AGM”), as required by the Singapore Companies Act 1967 (the “Act”)
根据《新加坡公司法1967》的要求，准备年度股东大会的文件
Preparing and submitting to the ACRA, the prescribed Annual Return as required by the Act
Drafting routine resolutions may be required for matters such as opening and closing bank account, appointments and resignation of company secretary, change of registered address etc.
配合公司发展需要准备相应的董事决议，例如银行账户开设/关闭帐户等董事决议，更换秘书以及更改注册地址等事项可能需要的董事决议
Liaison with auditors/accountants in respect of the statutory review of corporate secretarial records where applicable
如若公司有审计要求，配合联系审计师或会计师安排审核秘书文件以配合公司审计工作

Attend to ad hoc request, including preparation of resolutions and lodgments of necessary report/return/information with ACRA such as Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM), allotment of shares, transfer of shares, alteration of memorandum and articles of associations, Conversion of statutory financial statements to XBRL format for filling with ACRA etc. (additional service fees will be varying subject to complexity of the matter) where applicable
应特别要求，包括准备决议和提出必要的报告/申报/信息，例如特别股东大会（EGM），股份分配，股份转让，章程大纲和章程细则的变更，财务报告形式的转换（适用于ACRA等的XBRL格式的财务报表）（附加费用视情况而异）
Name as secretary of the Company (our secretary who is CPA will be named in ACRA bizfile)
担任公司秘书（我们的注册秘书
Important dates Notification during the year
Government Updates notifications and updates compliance (e.g. Register of controllers &KYC)
政府条例和信息更新/咨询等 （比如受益人申报的提交和更新）
Bank resolution preparation; service included in our incorporation service
Assisting with bank opening including introduce different banks and help do assessment
如果只是基本户，没有其他银行费用；开户决议我们会准备并安排初步审核不同银行
Or with your own bank relationships, support on bank opening will be provided
我们也会对接您自己委任的银行开户经理或者做开户的支持
Company Registered and Mailing Address Services
ostage or courier arrangement upon request
邮件信件, 根据客户要求安排邮递或快递(如需)
Being Named Local director in ACRA; Local Singaporean Director will be provided by us, and no operations will be involved
在公司注册局上显示本地董事，以符合公司法基本要求
Detailed refer to the Nominee Director Agreement drafted and finalized by our lawyer
详细参考我们的律师草拟的合约《挂名董事协议》
We also can involve lawyer review and consultations on our agreement where you have special conditions or requirements based on mutual agreement
如果您在相互协议的基础上有特殊条件或要求，我们还可以对我们的协议进行律师审查和咨询
Employment Pass (“EP”) refers to a work pass issued by the Ministry of Manpower (“MOM”) to eligible foreign professionals, managers, executives, and specialists working in Singapore
高级就业准证是由新加坡人力部签发给符合资格的外国专业人士、管理人员及专才的工作准证

the Company and/or applicant with the EP application process, including preliminary eligibility assessment and advisory, review and preparation of supporting documents, submission of EP application to MOM, posting of job advertisements where required, liaison with relevant authorities, submission of additional documents or appeals where necessary, and administrative support until issuance of the In-Principle Approval (“IPA”) letter and receipt of the EP card
申请，包括申请资格初步评估及咨询、审核及准备相关申请文件、向
提交申请、按要求发布招聘广告（如需）、与相关政府机构沟通、在需要时提交补充文件或上诉，并提供行政支持直至获得原则性批准函及领取
also provide related corporate administrative coordination and advisory support in connection with the EP application process
申请相关事宜提供企业行政协调及咨询支持服务（如需）
DP refers to a pass issued by the Ministry of Manpower (“MOM”) to eligible family members of Employment Pass or S Pass holders residing in Singapore.
家属准证是由新加坡人力部签发给符合资格的
的家属居留在新加坡的准证。

the Company and/or applicant with the DP application process, including review and preparation of supporting documents, submission of DP application to MOM, liaison with relevant authorities, submission of additional documents where required, and administrative support until issuance of the In-Principle Approval (“IPA”) letter and receipt of the DP card.
申请程序，包括审核及准备相关申请文件、向
申请、与相关政府机构沟通、在需要时提交补充文件，并提供行政支持直至获得原则性批准函（

The Company shall hold its Annual General Meeting (“AGM”) and file its Annual Return with the Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (“ACRA”) on a yearly basis in accordance with the Companies Act
and prevailing ACRA requirements. Annual compliance records, including the Register of Controllers and KYC, may also be reviewed and updated annually as required
及新加坡会计与企业管理局（
）并提交年度申报。公司合规资料，包括公司控制人登记册及
资料，亦可能按年度要求进行审查及更新
Full XBRL is required for a company with corporate shareholders. Partial XBRL is required for a company with net liability position. Other companies are not compulsory for XBRL services.
如果是具有公司股东或者净负债的公司，XBRL是强制性的。有企业股东的公司需要做完整XBRL格式，净负债公司需要做部分XBRL格式的报告；除外，其他公司不强制提交XBRL形式的报告。

XBRL stands for extensible Business Reporting Language. It is a language for the electronic communication of business and financial data worldwide. As one of the family of "XML" languages, it is becoming a standard means of communicating information between businesses and on the Internet.
XBRL代表可增强的业务报告语言。它是全球商业和财务数据电子通信的一种语言。作为"XML"语言的家族之一，它正成为企业之间和互联网上信息沟通的标准手段
Data processing of transactions based on client record and supporting documents
基于客户记录和提供的做账文件的交易数据处理
in the form of Trial Balance, Balance Sheet and Profit/Loss Account with
以试算表，资产负债表和损益表的形式准备财务管理报表，并附上附表

Compile the financial statements of the company including directors’ statement and financial position as at Year end and statement of comprehensive income, statement of changes in equity and statement of cash flows for the financial year ending together with notes to accounts.
编制公司的财务报表，包括截至年底的董事报表和财务状况，综合收益表，该会计年度结束时的权益变动表和现金流量表以及账目说明。
We will not carry out audit and/or review engagement procedures in relation to such financial statements.
我们不会对此类财务报表执行审计和/或审查委聘程序。
Consequently, no assurance on the financial statements will be expressed.
因此，此报告属于非审计报告，将不会对财务报表作出任何意见。
Auditing standards Singapore will be complied, auditor will express opinion in the audit report
将遵循新加坡的审计标准，并且审计师将在审计报告中表达意见
under small group can be exempt from audit, our accountant will approach you for confirmation
小集团公司可以免除审计，每年年底，我们的会计师将与您联系以进行详细确认
To qualify as a “small group”, the group (comprising of all the companies) must fulfil two out of the following three conditions in the immediately preceding financial year:
The consolidated revenue must not exceed S$ 10 million
The consolidated total assets must not exceed S$ 10 million
The total number of employees of the group must not exceed 50
如果公司或者集团满足以下
个条件，公司需要必须要出审计报告(如果股东是公司股东，则适用于公司和集团公司)：
财政年度的总收入超过
本财政年度的总资产超过
Preparing the Company’s Income Tax Return and Computation together with supporting schedules in compliance to the provisions in the Singapore Income Tax Act (“the Tax Enactments”)
“税收法规”）的规定，准备公司的所得税申报表和计算表
Reviewing tax status for claiming Tax Exemption, capital allowances, etc. where applicable
审查税收状况以申请免税，资本津贴等（如适用）
Verifying correctness of the Notices of Assessment and tax computation from the Inland Revenue of Singapore departments
验证新加坡税务局的评估通知和税收计算的正确性
Updating the Company on recent tax changes
更新公司关于税收政策的变化和告知相关政策信息
公司企业通行证账户申请
CorpPass is Singapore’s official corporate digital identity platform, which allows companies and authorised users to access and transact with Singapore government agencies electronically.
是新加坡政府官方企业数字身份平台，用于公司授权用户及办理各类政府机构电子服务。
the Company with the application, registration, set up, and activation of the Company’s CorpPass account, including administrator/user setup.
协助公司申请、注册、设立及启用
账户，包括管理员/用户设置

AIS (Auto-Inclusion Scheme) is an electronic employment income submission scheme administered by the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (“IRAS”), under which participating employers submit employees’ employment income information directly to IRAS electronically.
（自动纳入计划）是由新加坡税务局实施的电子雇佣收入申报制度，参与该计划的雇主须以电子方式直接提交员工雇佣收入资料。

Pursuant to prevailing IRAS requirements, employers with five (5) or more employees are required to participate in the AIS programme. For employers not participating in AIS, IR8A forms shall be prepared and issued to employees for individual income tax filing purposes.
根据新加坡税务局现行规定，拥有五（
）名或以上员工的雇主必须参加
计划，则须准备并向员工发出
表格，以供员工办理个人所得税申报之用。
Payroll Service refers to payroll administration and statutory contribution services provided in accordance with the applicable laws and regulations of Singapore
薪资服务是指根据新加坡适用法律及法规提供的薪资管理及法定缴纳服务

the Company with monthly payroll processing, including salary computation, preparation and issuance of payslips, CPF and Skills Development Levy (“SDL”) submission, as well as administrative support relating to payroll records and statutory payroll compliance matters.
协助公司处理每月薪资事务，包括薪资计算、薪水单出具、公积金（
）申报，以及与薪资记录及法定薪资合规事项相关的行政支持服务。
The Company shall ensure that all payroll information and supporting documents provided are accurate, complete, and submitted on a timely basis
ensure timely payment of employees’ salaries in accordance with the applicable payroll schedule and statutory requirements.
公司须确保所提供的薪资资料及相关文件真实、完整并按时提交。公司也须根据适用薪资安排及法定要求，按时向员工发放薪资。
reparation and submission of individual income tax returns to the Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (“IRAS”)
协助税务计算及向新加坡税务局提交个人所得税申报
ncluding the compilation and review of income information and supporting documents, as well as support relating to personal income tax filing matters
针对个人所得税申报，包括整理及核对收入资料与相关证明文件，并提供相关的支持
The accuracy and completeness of all information and supporting documents provided shall remain the responsibility of the individual taxpayer
所有提供资料及证明文件的真实性、准确性及完整性，均由个人纳税人负责

Work Pass Renewal Service refers to administrative assistance provided for the renewal of work passes issued by the Ministry of Manpower (“MOM”), including Employment Pass (“EP”), S Pass, and Dependent’s Pass (“DP”),
工作准证续签服务是指协助办理由新加坡人力部签发的各类准证续签服务，包括就业准证（

with the renewal process of the relevant work pass, including review supporting documents, eligibility assessment and advisory, submission of renewal application to MOM, liaison with relevant authorities, submission of additional documents where required, and administrative support until approval and receipt of the renewed pass card.
协助办理相关工作准证续签，包括审核相关文件、资格评估及咨询、向
提交续签申请、与相关政府机构沟通、在需要时提交补充文件，并提供行政支持直至续签获批。
Letter of Consent (LOC) for Secondary Directorship Application Service
兼任董事许可同意函申请

Letter of Consent ("LOC") for Secondary Directorship refers to the formal authorization granted by the Ministry of Manpower ("MOM") allowing an Employment Pass ("EP") holder to be appointed as a director in a related or investment-linked entity. This service ensures that the appointment
complies with the Employment of Foreign Manpower Act and maintains the integrity of the applicant's primary work pass status
兼任董事工作许可同意书（"LOC"）是指由新加坡人力部签发的正式授权，允许就业准证（"EP"）持有人在关联公司或具有投资关系的实体中担任董事职务。此服务旨在确保该任命符合《雇佣外国人力法令》，并维护申请人主准证身份的合规性

with the LOC application, including assessment of corporate nexus and eligibility, reviewing supporting documents (such as Board Resolutions from both the primary employer and the secondary entity), submission of the LOC application to MOM, liaison with relevant authorities for technical clarifications, and administrative support until the formal issuance of the LOC
协助办理LOC申请，包括评估公司关联性及申请资格、审核法定证明文件（如主雇主及兼职实体双方的董事会决议）、提交申请、并提供行政支持直至LOC正式签发
Company Incorporation and First-Year Service Fees:
设立和第一年的服务费用：
企业银行账户开户协助
Registered Office and Mailing Address Services
公司注册地址及收信服务
本地挂名董事服务（年费）
EP获批后一次性政府记录更新
数据保护官任命及政策文件
Indicative Fees for Ongoing Company Maintenance Services:
所需要的服务费用参考：
account opening and submission for one director
一名董事的个人所得税申报、
其他服务/政府费用（如有涉及）
技能发展津贴（新币 11.25/月，可每半年缴纳一次）
Our accounting fees will be revised according to the volume of work and the amount of time required.
我们的会计费用将根据工作量和所需时间进行调整。
For any other company changes, please refer to the last page for the applicable fees

The Company shall pay the applicable service fees in accordance with the quotation, invoice, or service package agreed between the parties. Unless otherwise agreed in writing, all service fees shall be payable in advance before commencement of the relevant service.
客户须根据双方确认的报价、账单或服务配套支付相应服务费用。除非双方另有书面约定，所有服务费用须在相关服务开始前预先支付。

Government fees, filing fees, application fees, statutory charges, courier fees, translation fees, notarisation fees, and any third-party disbursements are not included in the service fees unless expressly stated, and shall be borne by the
除非另有明确说明，政府费用、申报费用、申请费用、法定收费、快递费、翻译费、公证费及任何第三方代垫费用均不包含在服务费内，并应由客户另行承担。
shall provide all required information and supporting documents in a timely, accurate, and complete manner. Any delay caused by the
, government authority, or third party shall not be deemed as delay or default by
客户须及时、准确、完整地提供所需资料及文件。因客户、政府机构或第三方原因导致的延误，不视为服务提供方延误或违约。
Our services shall remain in force until terminated by either party giving two months’ notice. Payment for any unexpired period of our services is refundable to the company.
我们的服务将一直有效，直到任何一方在发出两个月的通知后终止为止。
我们未到期的服务付款将退还给公司。

Our performance of services is on a confidential basis with an undertaking that no information of whatsoever nature will be released to third parties except for our employees in charge of your account or another person designated by you in writing. The company and its directors agree to indemnify us for any losses, damages, costs and expenses in relation to proper performance of our duties unless caused by our willful default or negligence arising in connection with the performance or non-performance of our services.
我们的服务是在保密的基础上做出的，承诺除负责您帐户的员工或您书面指定的其他人外，不会将任何性质的信息透露给第三方。
公司及其董事同意赔偿与因履行职责所引起的任何损失，损害，成本和费用，除非是由于我们故意或不履行服务表现或不履行服务所引起的疏忽造成的。

We shall indemnify the company from and against all actions, proceedings, claims or demand brought or made against the company by the Government Agencies in consequence of any neglect or default or alleged neglect or default caused by ourselves in the performance of our services hereunder and the costs and expenses incurred in connection therewith.
对于因我们在执行本协议项下的服务和以下行为而引起的任何疏忽或违约或据称疏忽或违约而导致的政府机构对公司提出或提出的所有诉讼，诉讼，索赔或要求，我们应给予与之相关的费用和支出赔偿。
Thank you for giving us an opportunity to work with you and your Management.
感谢您给予我们与您和您的管理层合作的机会。
For any other post-incorporation changes, please refer to the following fee schedule (if applicable)
后期维护公司如若有其他变更事项，参考可能涉及到的费用列表
Company changes including Lodgement services to ACRA
Change of auditor (if appointed our auditor; if outside, $50 will be applicable)
审计师变更（如果聘用外部会计师服务，此变更收费
AGM and Annual return (Government fee SGD 60 applicable)
股东大会及年检申报（不包含政府费用
新元，现有客户无额外服务费用）
管理人员的任命及辞职
Any other lodgements other than regular changes
除定期更改外的其他任何提文
Special Resolution including Lodgement services to ACRA
特别董事会决议包括向
Amendment in company Constitution (based on complexity level, lawyer will be involved)
修改公司章程（根据复杂程度，需要请律师）
Removal of charge for ACRA register
其他投资的特别股东大会
Any other lodgements other than regular changes
除定期更改外的其他任何提文
Allotment of shares / Increase paid up capital
Share transfer (excluding Stamp duty and government fee)
股份转让（不包括印花税和政府费用）
Share transfer with any corporate shareholder (excluding Stamp and government fee)
与任何公司股东的股份转让（不包括印花税和政府费用）
Apply Trade Mark and assist to prepare documents
申请商标并协助准备文件
Assists and attend to Bank for bank requirement
协助并出席银行会议要求
Assists and attend to Court on behalf for tax purpose
代表税务目的协助并出庭
实际控制人登记册的递交
